burn.name: Burn
burn.note: ATK x0.7 while active. Fire affinity immune.

paralysis.name: Paralysis
paralysis.note: 25% skip turn, SPD x0.5. Lightning affinity immune.

seal.name: Seal
seal.note: Cannot use jutsu; taijutsu/items only. Yin affinity immune.

confusion.name: Confusion
confusion.note: 33% chance to strike self (40 pow typeless).

chakra_drain.name: Chakra Drain
chakra_drain.note: Team loses 1/10 max CP per turn; attacker gains it.

cursed_seal.name: Cursed Seal
cursed_seal.note: Forbidden power: STR/NIN x1.3 but the body is drained each turn.
